route.name: Tahoe Twirl
route.description: Official/public GPX alpine MTB route with singletrack, jeep roads, forest roads, bike paths, and pavement.
route.surfaceMix: Official/public GPX alpine MTB route with singletrack, jeep roads, forest roads, bike paths, and pavement.
route.bestSeason: Summer to fall; September is generally better than early July. Refresh snow, TRT rules, closures, smoke, and camps.

difficultyProfile.surface: Official/public GPX alpine MTB route with singletrack, jeep roads, forest roads, bike paths, and pavement.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Generally frequent in Tahoe basin, but dry exits and high sections need measurement from GPX.
resources.food: Reno, Tahoe City, South Lake Tahoe, Truckee, and route-adjacent services.
resources.camping: Camp/lodging sequence must be planned explicitly; vague dispersed camping is not acceptable under Truckee/Sierraville restrictions.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Keep as a future/segment candidate, not a next-weekend full route.
Use MTB tires and current closure alternates.
hazards: too long for July 10-13 full route

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: segment_only; full route too long/technical and no standalone legal segment is vetted
blockers: Full route is 187 miles / typically 4-5 days and technically hard.
TRT bike-day restrictions and Spooner-area closure/alternate need exact scheduling.
Local app geometry is only a rough line.
Full Tahoe Twirl remains rejected for next weekend: it is about 187 miles over 4.5 days and lacks an extracted segment GPX, exact overnight sites, and verified Spooner/TRT alternates.
Full route is not ride-ready for July 10-13 due to 187 miles / 4.5 days / technical singletrack.
No shorter Tahoe Twirl segment has a standalone GPX, exact overnight plan, verified Spooner alternate, and legal TRT bike-day timing.
Camping/lodging is not established for the selected dates.

TRTA lists bike prohibitions and even-day advisory segments; any Tahoe Twirl segment needs official bike-legality and closure/timing audit.
